title: A Minecraft Movie Splash Texts
description: Replaces the splash text with quotes from A Minecraft Movie.
body:
This resource pack replaces the default **splash texts** with quotes from _**A Minecraft Movie**_.

<details>
<summary>All splash texts</summary>
  
- As a child, I yearned for the mines.
- Go on, get outta here!
- 1989? That's all our ages ago.
- Never, under any circumstances, combine the Orb and Crystal.
- Follow my scent to 149 Holly Oak Drive.
- Creativity in this world is key to survival.
- Wait, who are you again?
- This guy is such a tool bag.
- What the heck?!
- Great. Now it's dark.
- We're not in Idaho anymore.
- I think this is Wyoming.
- The Orb has returned.
- SKYY-AH!
- Who are you?
- I... am Steve!
- Is he some kind of king?
- Technoblade never dies!
- Zero limits.
- UAAGHHH!
- This place makes no sense.
- La-la-la-lava! Ch-ch-ch-chicken!
- You wanna see a blade? I'll show you a blade.
- Flint and Steel!
- Dang it! A lava bucket!
- Looky, looky here.
- The Great Hog!
- I think he's Swedish.
- Pay close attention to papa Steve.
- They want me to fight the chicken?
- Chicken Jockey!
- Henry!
- Hank!
- Garrett!
- Gar-Gar!
- Steve!
- You must be Henry.
- The Overworld doesn't need you, Henry.
- You'll never be as cool as me, Hank.
- Just give up.
- This is all your fault, Henry.
- Did you get the Earth Crystal?
- Keep it metal. Keep it heavy. Real instruments.
- Dennis!
- The Great Darkening!
- Let's go fight some pigs.
- First we mine, then we craft. Let's Minecraft!
- Let's Minecraft!
- Get the Orb!
- This pig is mine.
- The Roundling got away!
- Roundling!
- Time to light this place up.
- Have a nice flight!
- Let's go save the Overworld!
- Hurry, Dennis!
- Hurry, Henry!
- Go, Henry, go!
- You sure you wanna go back, Henry?
- Gotcha, kid!
- Sneak attack!
- The Overworld lives on.
- You're a brave kid.
- Block City Battle Buddies!
- Too late, Clemente.
</details>

![A custom splash text in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GGuwjO85/images/fe36a09164fbe4b28f99120c9fd277b2672d5228.png)
